meaning: n.[希神]勒托(被Zeus所爱,与其生Apollo和Artemis)
examples: I have broken through your defenses, Leto.
The daughter of Zeus and Leto, and the twin sister of Apollo.
Accepting the best single prize for From Yesterday, Leto described the award as "an unbelievable gift".
He wrote of Niobe, the mother of 14 children who boasted about how much more fertile she was than the goddess Leto.
